Title: repl_text
Description: adds a SQL statement to the log of the replication

This SQL function adds the SQL statement to the log of the publication.
    The statement will typically be a procedure call but can be any SQL statement.
    There can be a parameters, which are bound to ?'s in the statement's text
    from left to right.  There is no restriction on the number of parameters.
Examples: SQL> repl_text ('demo-publication', 'insert into foo values (?, ?)', 1, 'this is a test');
